hook: Panic is named after the god who used to cause it.
modernAnchor: A market crashes. A crowd surges. You feel your heartbeat in your throat.
journey: Pan was the Greek god of the wild. Half man, half goat. He startled travelers in lonely forests.
The Greeks believed sudden inexplicable terror in empty places came directly from him.
Soldiers fleeing battlefields without reason were said to be panic-struck. Gripped by Pan himself.
The god is gone but his name still hijacks your nervous system every day.
